home.intro: I'm a developer and writer. I work at Deloitte as a consultant for Data Engineering and AI Engineering with a strong focus on Databricks. Previously, I was an AI Engineer at Deutsche Bundesbank.
home.mission: My life's work is [your mission]. I'm passionate about [interests].
home.personal: I'm a [personal details]. I last listened to [Song] by [Artist].

games.title: Games
games.subtitle: Take a break and play something fun

wordle.title: Wordle
wordle.instructions: Guess the word in 6 tries. Each guess must be a valid 5-letter word. The color of the tiles will change to show how close your guess was.

solver.title: Wordle Solver
solver.description: Get help solving any Wordle puzzle

demo.title: Solver Demo
demo.description: Watch the algorithm solve Wordle step by step

solver.enterGuess: Enter your guess and mark each letter
solver.clickToMark: Click tiles to cycle: absent → present → correct

kniffel.title: Kniffel
kniffel.instructions: Roll dice and score combinations. Play digitally or use as a tracker for physical dice.

bingo.title: Bingo Card Generator
bingo.description: Create colorful bingo cards for any occasion
bingo.instructions: Fill in your items, generate a card, and click tiles to mark them during play. Double-click to edit a tile.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro.description: Focus timer with scientifically-backed work/break intervals.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro.instructions: Choose a preset, then set a number of sessions or pick a time to focus until.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.breaksTooShort: Breaks are shorter than recommended. Consider longer breaks.
schedule.breaksTooLong: Breaks exceed the recommended ratio. Consider shorter breaks.

focusUntil.label: Focus until
focusUntil.pastTime: End time must be in the future
focusUntil.noFit: Selected preset doesn't fit in this time window

timeOfDay.peakFocus: Peak focus window — your best time for deep work.
timeOfDay.afternoonDip: Afternoon dip — consider a lighter task or shorter session.

notifications.workDone: Focus session complete! Time for a break.
notifications.breakDone: Break is over. Ready for the next session?
notifications.allDone: All sessions complete! Great work today.

sources.title: Scientific References
sources.pomodoroDesc: Original 25/5 pattern with 4-cycle structure. Foundation of structured interval-based focus.
sources.desktimeDesc: Analysis of top 10% most productive workers found 52/17 work-break ratio. Updated data suggests 75–112 min sessions.
sources.ultradianDesc: 90–120 minute biological rhythm affecting alertness and cognitive performance during wakefulness.
sources.hubermanDesc: Neurobiological basis for 90-minute focus sessions with 10–30 min defocus periods. Max 2–3 sessions per day.
sources.microbreaksDesc: Systematic review showing longer breaks yield greater performance recovery, especially after depleting tasks.
sources.breakRatioDesc: Most productive people spend 20–25% of their workday on breaks. Break quality matters as much as duration.
